events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The picture is in an alley. There is a man in an orange shirt riding an electric bicycle and several cyclists riding by.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 16.4s, the picture is in an alley. There is a man in an orange shirt riding an electric bicycle and several cyclists riding by.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A woman’s head poked out from under the alley, first moved to the right, then to the left, and finally to the right.
events.event_text: From 17.2s to 28.3s, a woman’s head poked out from under the alley, first moved to the right, then to the left, and finally to the right.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man in a blue shirt and helmet riding an electric bike came up and disappeared on the left side above the alley.
events.event_text: From 28.1s to 45.4s, a man in a blue shirt and helmet riding an electric bike came up and disappeared on the left side above the alley.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Below, a man in a gray shirt, black pants and a helmet rides an electric scooter towards the top of the road.
events.event_text: From 28.1s to 41.4s, below, a man in a gray shirt, black pants and a helmet rides an electric scooter towards the top of the road.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; An old man in a gray shirt riding a bicycle entered on the left side of the road, and a taxi drove to the left side of the road in the middle of the road.
